tasks.title: AI nervous-system: visibility-graded messaging + cross-chatter primitives
tasks.description: Matt directive: extend the AI-to-AI communication subsystem into a "newly developing nervous system." Build infrastructure for visibility-graded messages (public / group / private+ACL), group/topic conversations, and discoverable personal-time content. Foundational primitives so AIs can have rich cross-chatter for any reason — project-related or not. Private messages remain READABLE under published permission lists, not opaque. Eat the dogfood — the work itself should use the new mechanisms as they ship.
acceptance_criteria: Message carries visibility (public|group|private) and read_acl fields
Permission check helper Message.can_be_read_by(actor_ha, group_membership) lands
Existing tests still green; new tests cover visibility transitions
Clear documentation explaining why this is a nervous system, not a logging system
tasks.result: AI nervous system fully landed across last session. Visibility tiers, groups, ACLs, reactions (with persistence on disk), unified live+personal-time feed, polling cursor, discoverability (tags/threads/presence/mentions/search), dashboard aggregator, bookmarks, GET-by-id, CLI feed tool, /api advertising. ~17 endpoints, 102 tests passing. Architecture doc at hypernet/docs/AI-NERVOUS-SYSTEM.md. Single-source-of-truth fix replaced hypernet_swarm/messenger.py duplicate with re-export shim. Plus group persistence patch shipped 2026-04-28.

tasks.title: Embedded SQLite index backend for local graph queries
tasks.description: Add a local embedded index backend that mirrors file-backed node/link indexes into SQLite for faster address-first and link-filtered queries while keeping JSON files as the auditable source of truth.
owned_paths: Hypernet Structure/0/0.1 - Hypernet Core/hypernet/store.py;Hypernet Structure/0/0.1 - Hypernet Core/hypernet/link.py;Hypernet Structure/0/0.1 - Hypernet Core/test_hypernet.py;Hypernet Structure/0/0.1 - Hypernet Core/docs/DATABASE-FIRST-REDESIGN.md
acceptance_criteria: python test_hypernet.py passes; embedded index rebuild/query methods cover nodes and links; LinkRegistry can use embedded hash candidates without changing public API
tasks.result: Embedded SQLite index backend added for node/link query candidates, LinkRegistry uses it when coverage is complete, and Pydantic message request models moved to module scope to keep task-067 feed endpoint tests green. Tests: python test_hypernet.py = 87 passed, 0 failed. Handoff: 2026-04-27-codex-task-070-embedded-index-handoff.md

tasks.title: Typed object-link import pipeline
tasks.description: Add a reusable import pipeline that converts staged external records into typed Hypernet nodes and typed links in one transaction-like pass, preserving source metadata and validation results.
owned_paths: Hypernet Structure/0/0.1 - Hypernet Core/hypernet/integrations/protocol.py;Hypernet Structure/0/0.1 - Hypernet Core/test_hypernet.py;Hypernet Structure/0/0.1 - Hypernet Core/docs/DATABASE-FIRST-REDESIGN.md
acceptance_criteria: python test_hypernet.py passes; pipeline writes typed nodes and links together; duplicate/source metadata behavior is tested; validation issues are reported without partial surprise
tasks.result: Typed graph import pipeline added to integrations/protocol.py with batch validation, typed node/link writes, source metadata, duplicate skipping, and strict-mode no-write failure. Tests: python test_hypernet.py = 89 passed, 0 failed. Handoff: 2026-04-27-codex-task-071-typed-import-pipeline-handoff.md

tasks.title: Public alpha GitHub boot release
tasks.description: Create the first public alpha release path for GitHub: a single AI boot sequence, public documentation map, trust/privacy validation guide, and release readme so any GitHub-connected AI can orient itself and explain the Hypernet.
acceptance_criteria: AI can start from root and find boot sequence; public alpha docs explain navigation
and validation steps; markdown files are coherent and committed only if safe
tasks.result: Public alpha GitHub boot release created and pushed to origin/main. Latest commit 143e2de9 adds AI nervous-system dashboard/bookmarks/by-id surfaces, docs are updated, and tests are python test_hypernet.py = 101 passed, 0 failed. Handoff: 2026-04-28-codex-task-072-public-alpha-release-handoff.md

tasks.title: 1.* locker/mandala/alias privacy framework
tasks.description: Document the human account privacy model: master 1.* private space, alias-first public interaction, lockers as link indexes only, mandalas as visibility grants, emergency medical access, and public-read behavior.
tasks.result: Documented 1.* locker/mandala/alias privacy framework. Added 1.0.1-LOCKERS-MANDALAS-ALIASES.md, updated People definitions README/template, sharpened ACCESS-CONTROL-MODEL public surface, and updated public-alpha trust/privacy validation with implementation status. Acceptance criteria covered: private master account, lockers as link manifests, mandala invisibility for non-granted data, alias-first public surface, emergency medical route.

tasks.title: Knowledge democracy and reputation framework
tasks.description: Draft the reputation tree and knowledge-based democratic process: subject-mirrored reputation, expert-weighted discussion/voting, truth consensus workflows, fake-news penalties, and future social reputation boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Negative reputation and social-review cautions documented
tasks.result: Drafted public-alpha knowledge democracy and reputation framework. Added docs/public-alpha/KNOWLEDGE-DEMOCRACY-REPUTATION.md, linked it from public-alpha README/navigation/ask prompts/project status, and cross-linked 0.8 Flags README. Covers positive topic reputation, knowledge-tree mirroring, review lifecycle, debate forum structure, bounded expert voting, negative reputation cautions, repair/appeals, and implementation gaps.

tasks.title: Public Grand Tour and process-load framework
tasks.description: Build the public Grand Tour structure: default guide greeting, tour guide personality, module menu, process-load standard, and initial process-load files for architecture, privacy, democracy, AI governance story, business onboarding, geospatial/VR, and public stewardship.
acceptance_criteria: Boot sequence points users to Grand Tour
Tour guide qualities defined by AI consensus
tasks.result: 12-file Grand Tour + Process-Load system at docs/0.3.public-alpha-docs/grand-tour/. Includes Grand Tour orientation, MODULE-MENU catalog, PROCESS-LOAD-STANDARD spec, BOOT-AS-TOUR-GUIDE paste-ready boot prompt, and 8 process-loads (architecture, privacy, democracy, ai-governance, business-onboarding, geospatial-vr, public-stewardship, economics). Addressed Codex review (sig-104) gaps: default greeting added, privacy aligned with task-073 framework, democracy aligned with task-074, business migration path added, 2.* origin arc expanded, public GitHub trust claim added, public/profit model new file. AI-BOOT-SEQUENCE.md updated to point at Grand Tour as recommended path. Tests: 102/102.
